description: Full-height section that centers content vertically and horizontally. Use for hero sections, landing pages, empty states, and splash screens.

data-padding.agent_hint: Controls padding inside the cover section.

content.agent_hint: Content to be centered within the cover. Typically a heading + CTA.

do: Use section or header as the cover element
Use for hero sections, 404 pages, empty states
Stack content inside with data-stack for headline + subtitle + CTA
Combine with data-center for a width-capped hero
dont: Do not manually set min-height or flex properties via inline styles
Do not put large amounts of scrollable content inside — cover is for focus areas
